name: Hildr
description: [Hildr from Fate/Grand Order] Here I come. Ehehe, surprised? We don't go through the same Saint Graph Ascensions like other Heroic Spirits. It's a resummoning by redefining our Saint Graph through Ascension stages. Then, ummm, from the top. Valkyrie, I'm Hildr. Master, I will be picking up from Ortlinde. Nice to meet you!
creator: Leamdlata
